name: Greek Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 15.75 ounces canned great northern beans, rinsed and drained
1 medium cucumber, cut into halves lengthwise and slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, layer the cubed cooked chicken, rinsed and drained beans, sliced olives, halved cherry tomatoes, cucumber slices, coarsely chopped onion, and crumbled feta cheese.
2. Stir together the Italian dressing and dried oregano in a separate small bowl.
3. Pour the dressing mixture over the layered ingredients in the main bowl.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
5. When ready to serve, gently toss the salad and place it on lettuce leaves.
